rows.label: tev018301_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Byron about Dolls.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Byron about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Byron about Doll fuel recovery.

rows.label: tev018301_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Byron about the restricted hangar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_SEL0091
rows.name:
Ask Byron about the black craft
in the restricted hangar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_SEL0111
rows.name: Ask Byron about the Prog Ares.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Byron about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0001
rows.name:
BLADEs purchase their own Dolls and
customize them as they see fit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0002
rows.name:
Since there's no one uniform
configuration, they all have
unique maintenance needs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0003
rows.name:
When you're tinkering around with a particular
Doll all day, it's kind of hard not to fall
in love with its little quirks, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0004
rows.name:
When those Dolls get taken on missions,
I can't help but worry about whether
they'll make it back safely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0005
rows.name:
If you ever buy a Doll, make
sure to take good care of it,
okay? Don't let it get wrecked![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0010
rows.name:
Once a week, I get together with
an engineer named Alan to make
small rockets in our workshop.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0011
rows.name:
When they're finished, we're going to insert
messages to the other ships that we've lost
contact with and send them off into space.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0012
rows.name: It's a little sentimental, I know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0013
rows.name:
But it's also a lot of fun building
things when you're motivated by hope.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0018
rows.name:
The main thing to remember is
that destroying enemy appendages
refills your Doll's fuel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0019
rows.name:
Even if you're outside your Doll
and fighting on the ground, the
fuel will still be refilled.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0020
rows.name:
...Huh? You want to know how that works? Well, the
reactor inside your Doll absorbs the special heat
that's released when an appendage is destroyed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0021
rows.name:
See, modern reactors are designed to more efficiently
utilize the diffusion of thermal energy than— ...Okay,
I better stop. Even I'm getting bored now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0023
rows.name:
That's where new and experimental
prototypes are stored.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0024
rows.name:
We're lucky that alien idol was the only
thing that was stolen out of there![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0025
rows.name:
If they had taken or destroyed
everything in there...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0026
rows.name:
well, we might have lost our trump card
for our upcoming war with the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0031
rows.name:
There's been a parade of
BLADEs gathering in front of
the restricted hangar today.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0032
rows.name: The heck is going on over there?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0033
rows.name:
Don't tell me the Growth came
back to steal something else![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0038
rows.name:
It came flying out of the restricted hangar, straight
through the rest of the hangars, and just kept
going! I don't have any idea where it ended up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0039
rows.name:
Could that mean...it was
stolen by the enemy?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0040
rows.name:
That prototype was the most powerful
of all the Dolls in the restricted
hangar, and no exaggeration.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0041
rows.name:
If they managed to steal it from
us, I don't know that we'd have
any hope of winning this war...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0046
rows.name:
It was a new Doll prototype based
off the model known as the Ares.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0047
rows.name:
But they don't tell factory-floor
mechanics like us anything about
what makes that Ares so special.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0048
rows.name:
Still, it IS the basis for a craft
as exceptional as the Prog Ares...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG0049
rows.name:
So that means it must be
something really remarkable![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG1001
rows.name:
I told you about the little
"messages in bottles" Alan and
I are making as a hobby, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG1002
rows.name:
The messages are contained inside
little rockets that we're sending to
the ships we've lost contact with.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG1003
rows.name:
Well, another engineer has
joined in to help make our
silly little dream a reality.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG1004
rows.name:
She's a colleague of Alan's,
and her name is Brena.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev018301_MSG1005
rows.name:
She's really a great engineer. ...And so beautiful!
I can't tell you how much I've come to look forward
to our weekend rocket-building sessions![ST:wait ]
